creator: marek@mky.waw.pl
text:
Hi,

I can confirm, that the new version of firmware (25.4.0.0015), released by Dell on 01 Apr 2016, solves this problem. You can download the new firmware here: 
http://www.dell.com/support/home/us/en/19/Drivers/DriversDetails?driverId=TMKHJ

Tested on PowerEdge R530 with PERC H730P Mini. The hard drives no longer disappear after 'camcontrol identify'.
